x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: OT asset (CMDB CI) volume reflects the scope of the OT environment under management. Comprehensive OT asset coverage enables Now Assist to provide contextually accurate recommendations by correlating incidents and changes with affected OT systems.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure OT assets are discovered and catalogued in the CMDB using OT-specific discovery tools.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3d
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[OT asset (CMDB CI) volume reflects the scope of the OT environment under management. Comprehensive OT asset coverage enables Now Assist to provide contextually accurate recommendations by correlating incidents and changes with affected OT systems.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>OT Asset (cmdb_ci_ot) Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci_ot");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" OT assets",finding:c+" OT assets found in CMDB."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" OT assets",finding:c+" OT assets in CMDB."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 OT assets",finding:"No OT assets found in CMDB."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>OTSM</module>
<number>CHK0006172</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure OT assets are discovered and catalogued in the CMDB using OT-specific discovery tools.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c3d</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
